farmerName.description: Full legal name of the Nigerian farmer. Used to cross-validate name consistency across all uploaded documents.

farmLocation.description: Nigerian state and LGA. Echoed from Eligibility Agent output for downstream agents.

farmType.description: Primary farming activity type. Echoed from Eligibility Agent output for downstream agents.

farmSizeHectares.description: Farm size in hectares. Echoed from Eligibility Agent output for downstream agents.

requestedFundingAmountNGN.description: Requested funding in NGN. Echoed from Eligibility Agent output for downstream agents.

isSmallholderFarmer.description: Smallholder flag. Echoed from Eligibility Agent output for downstream agents.

isYouthFarmer.description: Youth farmer flag. Echoed from Eligibility Agent output for downstream agents.

isWomanFarmer.description: Woman farmer flag. Echoed from Eligibility Agent output for downstream agents.

proposedProjectDescription.description: Proposed project description. Echoed from Eligibility Agent output for the Proposal Agent.

topRecommendedGrant.description: Name of the best-matched grant from the Eligibility & Assessment Agent (e.g. 'NIRSAL AGSMEIS'). This is the primary grant the document analysis must support.

grantName.description: Full official grant name. Echoed from Eligibility Agent output for downstream agents. Omit if same as topRecommendedGrant.

sponsorOrganization.description: Grant sponsor name from Eligibility Agent output (e.g. 'NIRSAL', 'Central Bank of Nigeria'). Echoed to downstream agents.

grantUrl.description: URL to the grant portal or application page from Eligibility Agent output. Echoed to downstream agents.

maxFundingAmountNGN.description: Maximum grant award in NGN from Eligibility Agent output. Echoed to downstream agents.

applicationDeadline.description: Application closing date from Eligibility Agent output. Echoed to downstream agents.

eligibilityVerdict.description: Eligibility verdict from the Eligibility & Assessment Agent. Echoed to downstream agents.

overallEligibilityScore.description: Eligibility score 0–100 from the Eligibility & Assessment Agent. Echoed to downstream agents.

eligibilityStrengths.description: Strengths identified by the Eligibility Agent. Used to align document analysis with confirmed positives. Echoed to Proposal Agent.

eligibilityRiskFactors.description: Risk factors identified by the Eligibility Agent. Used to find documents that address or mitigate these risks.

eligibilityRecommendations.description: Recommendations from the Eligibility Agent passed to Proposal Agent. Echoed through.

analystNarrativeFromEligibility.description: Analyst narrative from the Eligibility & Assessment Agent. Echoed to the Proposal Agent.

requiredDocuments.description: Specific documents required for the topRecommendedGrant, as identified by the Eligibility & Assessment Agent (e.g. ['CAC certificate','BVN confirmation slip','3-month stamped bank statement','C of O','Cooperative membership letter']). Used to check completeness of uploaded files.

documents.description: Uploaded documents from the farmer via the web app. Supported types: NIN slip, Voter Card, Passport, Driver's Licence, C of O, R of O, Survey Plan, CAC papers, bank statements, cooperative certificate, NIRSAL/CBN loan docs, NAFDAC permits. Each file is a job-attachment object.

documentTypes.description: Optional: Labels for each uploaded document matching the order of the documents array (e.g. ['National ID','Land Certificate','Bank Statement']). Helps the agent classify documents faster. Omit if unknown.

extractionGoal.description: Optional: Specific purpose for this extraction (e.g. 'Grant eligibility verification for NIRSAL AGSMEIS', 'Confirm land ownership for BOA loan'). Guides which fields the agent prioritises. Omit if general extraction is required.

MimeType.description: The MIME type of the content, such as "application/json" or "image/png"

farmerName.description: Full name of the farmer, echoed from input for downstream agents.

farmLocation.description: Nigerian state and LGA, echoed from input for downstream agents.

farmType.description: Farm type, echoed from input for downstream agents.

farmSizeHectares.description: Farm size in hectares, echoed from input for downstream agents.

requestedFundingAmountNGN.description: Requested funding in NGN, echoed from input for downstream agents.

isSmallholderFarmer.description: Smallholder flag, echoed from input for downstream agents.

isYouthFarmer.description: Youth farmer flag, echoed from input for downstream agents.

isWomanFarmer.description: Woman farmer flag, echoed from input for downstream agents.

proposedProjectDescription.description: Proposed project description, echoed from input for the Proposal Agent.

topRecommendedGrant.description: Name of the recommended grant, echoed from input for downstream agents.

grantName.description: Full official grant name, echoed from input for downstream agents.

sponsorOrganization.description: Grant sponsor, echoed from input for downstream agents.

grantUrl.description: Grant portal URL, echoed from input for downstream agents.

maxFundingAmountNGN.description: Maximum grant award in NGN, echoed from input for downstream agents.

applicationDeadline.description: Application deadline, echoed from input for downstream agents.

eligibilityVerdict.description: Eligibility verdict from Eligibility Agent, echoed for downstream agents.

overallEligibilityScore.description: Eligibility score 0–100 from Eligibility Agent, echoed for downstream agents.

eligibilityStrengths.description: Strengths from Eligibility Agent, echoed for the Proposal Agent.

eligibilityRiskFactors.description: Risk factors from Eligibility Agent, echoed for the Proposal Agent.

eligibilityRecommendations.description: Recommendations from Eligibility Agent, echoed for the Proposal Agent.

analystNarrativeFromEligibility.description: Analyst narrative from Eligibility Agent, echoed for the Proposal Agent.

grantRequirementsCoverage.description: For each document listed in requiredDocuments from the Eligibility Agent, indicates whether it was found and validated in the uploaded files.

requiredDocument.description: Name of the document required by the grant (from Eligibility Agent's requiredDocuments list).

notes.description: Optional: brief note on why status was assigned (e.g. 'BVN confirmation slip found and matches farmer name').

rpaAttachmentRequired.description: True if one or more documents must be physically attached during RPA portal submission. False if no attachments are needed for this grant's online form. This flag tells the RPA Portal Submission Robot whether to enter attachment mode.

documentsToAttachForRPA.description: List of specific documents the RPA Portal Submission Robot must attach during form submission. Empty array if rpaAttachmentRequired is false. Each item names the document type and its file reference.

documentType.description: Type of document (e.g. 'CAC Certificate', 'Bank Statement', 'C of O', 'Passport Photograph').

fileName.description: Original file name from the uploaded documents array.

attachmentNotes.description: Optional: notes for the RPA robot (e.g. 'Attach to Section 4 — Supporting Documents', 'Required file format: PDF only').

documentBoostInsights.description: Key details discovered in the documents that strengthen the farmer's grant application case. These are passed to the Proposal Agent to weave into the proposal narrative (e.g. 'Bank statement confirms consistent monthly inflow of NGN 150,000 — demonstrates financial stability', 'C of O confirms 4.2 ha ownership — satisfies smallholder land requirement for NIRSAL', 'Cooperative certificate dated 2021 — proves 5 years active membership').

nameConsistencyCheck.description: Result of cross-checking the farmer's name across all documents.

documentResults.description: Per-document extraction results. One object per uploaded document — never skip one.

documentIndex.description: Zero-based index matching position in the input documents array.

fileName.description: Original file name of the uploaded document.

detectedDocumentType.description: Document type as detected (e.g. 'NIN Slip', 'C of O', 'CAC Registration', 'Bank Statement', 'Cooperative Certificate').

extractedFields.description: Key-value pairs of all extracted fields. Keys in lowercase snake_case (e.g. full_name, nin_number, land_area_hectares).

validationStatus.description: Authenticity: Valid / Likely Valid / Suspicious / Invalid / Unverifiable.

flags.description: Specific anomalies detected. Empty array if none.

documentSummary.description: 1–2 sentence plain-English summary of what this document confirms about the farmer.

consolidatedFarmerProfile.description: Unified profile assembled from all documents — most reliable version of each data point.

fullName.description: Best confirmed full name across all documents.

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD) if found.

nationalId.description: NIN or other national ID number if found.

address.description: Most complete address found across documents.

stateOfOrigin.description: Nigerian state of origin if found.

landHoldings.description: Confirmed land parcels with size and location.

businessRegistration.description: CAC registration number and business name if found.

bankDetails.description: Bank name, account name, last 4 digits if found.

farmingActivities.description: Confirmed farming activities or crops from cooperative or certification documents.

activeLoansOrObligations.description: Any active loans or CBN/NIRSAL obligations found in documents.

crossDocumentInconsistencies.description: Contradictions found when comparing data across documents. Empty array if none.

missingCriticalDocuments.description: Documents not uploaded that are required for the grant. Cross-referenced against requiredDocuments from Eligibility Agent. Empty array if all provided.

overallDocumentScore.description: Composite document quality and completeness score 0–100.

documentVerdict.description: Overall document package verdict: Strong (85–100), Adequate (70–84), Needs Improvement (50–69), Insufficient (30–49), Rejected (0–29).

analystNotes.description: 200–350 word professional narrative in third person covering: what was found, key concerns, consistency assessment, grant requirements coverage, and overall confidence in the document package.

recommendations.description: Concrete actions for the farmer to resolve flags, fill gaps, or strengthen their document package (e.g. 'Resubmit NIN slip with clearer scan', 'Provide recent bank statement stamped by bank manager').
